rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JERROLD HARATANI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Court to determine whether to approve the request for the increase of the income payment for annuity. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEONARD ESPOSTO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Supplemental Accounting Of The Reserve
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. (2) No proof of service of notice has been filed. (3) Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. (4) The report was not signed or verified by the administrator. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT PICASO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The petition has not been reviewed, as it is unclear what the assets of the estate are, and no clarification has been provided, despite the hearing being continued for over 5 months. 2) Objection has been filed. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE PATRICK WILLIAMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ANNA ROMERO REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, DATED MAY 9, TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Determining Asset To Be Trust Asset And For Authority To Transfer Asset To The Trustee Of The Anna Romero Revocable Living Trust
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues may include: 1) Court to determine whether a corrective deed is only effective as to correcting minor errors and whether a change in the transferee is a minor error. 2) A grant deed was executed that transferred a joint tenancy interest in the subject real property to George Albert Romero, a deceased person. 3) George Albert Romero never held legal title to the subject real property while alive and never had an opportunity to sever the joint tenancy. 4) Personal service has not been served on intestate heirs who are not trust beneficiaries. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
